---
title: "proposal"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Project Proposal

## 1. Dataset

\### source : The European Parenting Leave Policies (EPLP) Dataset

\### URL : <https://zenodo.org/records/17648712>

## 2. Research Question

- **Descriptive** : How has maternity leave has changed over the years (depending on the country?)

- **Exploratory** : How does maternal leave change depending on the country, comparing types of maternity leave and aid ?

- **Explanatory** : How do duration of maternal leave and amount of financial support correlate?

## 3. IDA

```         
### 
Rows: 1,156
Columns: 35
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)

data <- readxl::read_excel(
  "data-raw/EPLP_Dataset_Workbook_v2.xlsx",
  sheet = "Dataset",
  skip = 1
)



glimpse(data)
summary(data)
```

## 4. Analysis plan

## 5. Workflow organisation

- **Code style:** Tidyverse

- **Packages:** Which packages will you rely on? Will you use `renv` to lock package versions so the project is reproducible across machines?

- **Git workflow:** How will you divide work? Describe your branching strategy — will each person work on their own branch, or will you split by task?

- **`.gitignore`:** What will you exclude from version control (e.g. raw data files, rendered outputs, `.env` secrets)?
